summary: Comprehensive backend API testing for AL BASIR TOUR. 47/47 pytest tests passing (100%). Verified all requested endpoints: public content (tours, countries, reviews, blog, faq, gallery, partners, testimonials, stats), auth (register/login/me via Bearer AND cookie, Google session rejects invalid), bookings (guest + auth, mine, admin listing, status transitions, RBAC), payments (receipt upload + admin verify auto-confirms linked booking), admin (stats with 7-day series, users list, role update by super-admin), settings (public GET + admin PUT with persistence), favorites toggle, chat sessions (admin-only) + WebSocket message round-trip (connect->history frame->send->broadcast->history REST), and CORS preflight.

minor.issue: Email is silently lowercased on register (documented behavior in code: email.lower().strip()) — consider preserving case for display or documenting explicitly in API.
Publicly exposes bank_details / payment_qr / payment_link even for unauthenticated users. This is intentional per spec (public GET), but bank_details might be sensitive — confirm with product.
Does not verify that the booking belongs to the requesting user — any authenticated user can attach a receipt to any booking_id (only 404 if booking missing). Consider ownership check.
Returns {ok: true} but does not return the updated user document — inconsistent with other update endpoints that return the modified resource.
Does not validate that tour_slug (when provided) actually references an existing tour; invalid slugs are silently accepted.
Uses query param `approved` (bool) with default true — safer as JSON body; also does not revert booking status when approved=false is called after a previous approval.

action_items: Optional: Add ownership check on POST /api/payments/receipt to prevent attaching receipts to other users' bookings.
Optional: Validate tour_slug references an existing tour in POST /api/bookings.
Optional: Return the updated user object from PATCH /api/users/{id}/role for API consistency.
Optional: Reconsider exposing bank_details in the public GET /api/settings endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 899 lines — recommend splitting into modules (auth.py, tours.py, bookings.py, chat.py, seed.py) for maintainability.
Cookies set with samesite='none' + secure=True are correct for cross-origin frontend; works over the preview HTTPS URL and cookie-based /auth/me was verified working.
Emergent Google session endpoint correctly validates via demobackend.emergentagent.com and rejects invalid session_id with 401 (verified live).
WebSocket at /api/ws/chat/{session_id} works: sends 'history' frame on connect, broadcasts 'message' frames on send, persists to db.chat_messages (confirmed via GET /api/chat/history/{sid}).
Payment approval correctly auto-confirms the linked booking (verified end-to-end: create booking -> receipt -> verify approved -> booking status=confirmed).
Role gating verified: /api/bookings (admin only), /api/stats/admin, /api/users, /api/chat/sessions all return 403 for non-admin users.
Password hashing uses bcrypt (verified $2b$ format via hash_password), admin password sync-on-startup implemented, no plaintext leaks in /api/users response (password_hash filtered).
test_credentials: Admin: admin@albasir.com / Admin@2026 ; Demo user: user@albasir.com / User@2026 — both verified via login.
seed_data_creation: No custom seed created. Used existing seed_all() output: 8 tours, 8 countries, 6+ reviews, blog posts, FAQ, testimonials, partners, gallery. Tests create ephemeral TEST_ prefixed bookings/payments/users; no cleanup performed (safe as isolated test data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green (47/47). Test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py can be re-run as regression suite: `cd /app/backend && pytest tests/backend_test.py -v`. WebSocket URL derived from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL by replacing https->wss. If frontend testing is next, key flows: (a) register/login sets httpOnly cookie usable for subsequent auth, (b) booking form should call POST /api/bookings (works with or without auth token), (c) admin dashboard needs to consume /api/stats/admin (has 7-day series array), (d) chat widget must connect to wss://.../api/ws/chat/{session_id}, expect first frame type='history'.
rca of the issue: N/A — all endpoints functioning correctly. Only one test-side issue (email case) fixed by lowercasing test fixture value to match backend normalization.
